name: CHANG TYPE Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: CHANG TYPE Industrial Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells power tools. It provides miter, radial arm, band, and scroll saws. The company's products are used in other power tools, lawn and gardening, consumer electronics, and fitness applications. It also offers motors and IC control boards. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.
